answer:
Oh, sure! So, I remember this time back in college when I really became close to my roommate, Jake. At first, we were just, you know, two guys sharing a space and going about our lives. But then, one weekend, we decided to hang out together after classes. We ended up binge-watching this really popular show and just, like, talking for hours about everything, from our favorite movies to our childhood memories. 

That was a turning point, honestly. We found out we had so much in common, like both being huge fans of basketball and loving pizza—who doesn’t, right? After that, we started doing everything together, whether it was studying for exams or going out for late-night snacks. 

I think what really solidified our friendship was when we went on this road trip during spring break. Just being stuck in the car together for hours, blasting music, and having these deep conversations really brought us closer. I guess we both realized how much we could count on each other. Looking back, I feel super grateful for that friendship; it made my college experience so much better.
title: Tell me about when you became close to another person.
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20250225/16b96b5ecf9f4d8aa96e63ed41b227cb.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：  
“Start by introducing the relationship: Building close relationships can be a profound experience, and I became particularly close to [name of the person or relation, e.g., a friend, family member] when [specific time or event].”

正文：  
关于初始联系：  
“Explain how you met or what started the friendship: We first connected when [describe the situation, such as in school or a mutual interest], which sparked our initial bond.”  

关于共同经历：  
“Discuss moments that strengthened your closeness: What really brought us closer was [mention shared experiences or activities, such as working on a project, traveling together, or supporting each other].”  

关于支持的例子：  
“Provide a specific example of mutual support: For instance, when [describe a challenging situation they faced or you faced], we [actions you both took to help one another], which solidified our friendship.”

结论：  
“Summarize the significance of this closeness: In conclusion, becoming close to [the person's name] has been invaluable because [mention the benefits or positive impact on your life, like emotional support, companionship].”  

最后的想法：  
“It's amazing how certain experiences can forge deep connections between people.”","titleTranslate":"告诉我你何时与另一个人变得亲近。"}
